rows.title: Field note for the launch issue
rows.body: The strongest copy line is not the most dramatic one. It is the one the team can repeat under pressure.

rows.title: Draft the morning brief
rows.body: Keep the editorial tone warm, but let the numbers carry the conviction. Avoid slogans unless they earn their place.

rows.title: Archive the references
rows.body: Collect screenshots, launch notes, and copy fragments in one place so they stop leaking across chats and tabs.
